MIPROv2 prompt optimization pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses DSPy MIPROv2 with auto=light and no bootstrapped/labeled demos to perform lightweight prompt optimization; post-optimization placeholder restoration ensures template variables survive rewriting.

nodes.label: Domain Concept (Source Folder → Wiki Folder Pair)
Domain Architect (domain-map.json generator)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Generates a domain entry for domain-map.json with id, name, wiki_folder, source_paths, entity_types, language_notes fields

nodes.label: EntityType Structure
nodes.contributor: rationale: Each entity_type has: type, description, extraction_cues, min_mentions_for_page, wiki_subfolder — subfolder must be one word without slashes or domain_id

nodes.label: wiki_subfolder Rule (one word, no slashes)
nodes.contributor: rationale: wiki_subfolder must be a single word, no slashes, no domain_id prefix. Valid: network, processes. Invalid: os/network, os_network

nodes.label: Format Schema Frontmatter Fields
nodes.contributor: rationale: Non-wiki frontmatter: tags, aliases, created, updated, external_links (only if http URLs exist in body), related (wikilinks only if already referenced in body). wiki_* fields excluded — managed programmatically

nodes.label: Format Schema Content Rules
nodes.contributor: rationale: Hard prohibitions: no invented facts (except vision image extraction), no fact deletion, no meaning distortion; all changes listed in report

nodes.label: {{placeholder}} template syntax
nodes.rationale: Templates use {{placeholder}} syntax so that restore_placeholders() can ensure named slots survive MIPROv2 rewriting, preserving prompt structure through optimization.

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2: automated prompt optimization via Optuna
ClaudeCodeLM: DSPy-compatible adapter for Claude CLI
CHANGELOG
nodes.summary: Version history of the obsidian-ai-wiki plugin. Tracks new features, bug fixes, and refactors across releases from 0.1.108 through 0.1.155.

nodes.label: Format Prompt (format.md)
nodes.summary: LLM system prompt for the Format operation. Instructs the model to reformat a markdown page without altering facts, preserving Obsidian embeds and returning a strict JSON response with 'report' and 'formatted' fields.
nodes.rationale: Strict JSON-only output and explicit escaping rules prevent parse failures. Obsidian embed preservation rule was added to stop LLM from converting ![[...]] to standard Markdown, which breaks vault links.

nodes.label: Architecture Documentation
nodes.summary: lat.md knowledge graph file describing the high-level architecture of the plugin: Plugin entry point, Controller, AgentRunner, Phase Functions, Backends, PageSimilarityService, VaultTools, Settings, Storage Migration, Wiki Stem Mask, Frontmatter Validator, Sidebar View, and Run Events.

nodes.label: Operations Documentation
nodes.summary: lat.md knowledge graph file documenting the seven plugin operations: Init, Ingest, Query, Lint, Lint-Chat, Chat, and Format, including sub-phases and design details.

nodes.label: LlmWikiPlugin (Plugin Entry Point)
nodes.summary: Top-level Obsidian plugin class. Registers commands, sidebar view, ribbon icon, and status bar. Owns WikiController, DomainStore, and LocalConfigStore. Handles multi-version settings migration on load.

nodes.label: WikiController (Controller)
nodes.summary: Orchestration layer between the UI and AgentRunner. Guards busy state, resolves the active backend, builds an AgentRunner, and streams RunEvents to the sidebar view. Persists domain mutations from events via DomainStore.

nodes.label: AgentRunner
nodes.summary: Stateless execution engine receiving a RunRequest, selecting LLM call options per operation, and delegating to phase functions. Includes idle watchdog retry logic and optional devMode evaluator.
nodes.rationale: Stateless design ensures no shared mutable state bleeds between runs. Per-attempt AbortController with idle timeout and retry supports unreliable LLM backends that silently stall.

nodes.label: Phase Functions
nodes.summary: Each operation is implemented as an async generator in src/phases/. Functions yield RunEvent objects and write directly to the vault via VaultTools with no shared mutable state between phases.
nodes.rationale: Async generator pattern allows streaming events to the UI incrementally. No shared state between phases prevents cross-operation data corruption.

nodes.label: Native Agent Backend
nodes.summary: OpenAI-compatible HTTP client using the openai SDK. Works with Ollama, OpenAI, or any compatible server. Supports streaming, json_object format, thinking budget, and per-operation model overrides. Mobile streaming is disabled via wrapMobileNoStream.

nodes.label: Claude Agent Backend
nodes.summary: Wraps ClaudeCliClient to spawn iclaude.sh/claude CLI as a subprocess. Requires shell consent on first run. Not available on mobile. Per-operation effort levels map to Claude's extended thinking.

nodes.label: PageSimilarityService
nodes.summary: Reduces LLM context by pre-selecting top-K relevant wiki pages. Supports two modes: jaccard (token overlap, no API calls) and embedding (OpenAI-compatible vectors, cached per domain). Exposes selectRelevant, selectRelevantScored, and selectByEntities.
nodes.rationale: Jaccard mode provides zero-cost relevance filtering with no external API dependency. Embedding mode enables semantic similarity but falls back to Jaccard on error, ensuring resilience. Cache invalidated by content hash avoids redundant API calls.

nodes.label: VaultTools
nodes.summary: Thin adapter over Obsidian's vault API for read, write, list, mkdir, remove, and rmdir. Decouples phase functions from Obsidian internals and enables testing.
nodes.rationale: Adapter pattern isolates Obsidian-specific vault API behind a thin interface, making phase functions testable without an Obsidian runtime.

nodes.label: Settings and Local Config
nodes.summary: Settings split into data.json (synced, user preferences) and local.json (machine-local, never synced, holds secrets like API keys and iclaudePath). resolveEffective merges both at runtime.
nodes.rationale: Split avoids syncing secrets (API keys, passwords) across devices via Obsidian Sync. local.json also stores machine-specific overrides like backend selection and agentLogEnabled.

nodes.label: Storage Migration
nodes.summary: One-time migration on plugin load that moves .config/ directories to _config/. Throws StorageMigrationConflictError if both exist simultaneously, indicating an interrupted migration.

nodes.label: Wiki Stem Mask
nodes.summary: Centralizes the wiki_<domain>_<entity> filename mask used wherever a wiki page stem is generated or validated. Exposes slugifyEntity, buildWikiStem, stemRegex, and GENERIC_WIKI_STEM_REGEX.
nodes.rationale: Consistent stem naming disambiguates wiki pages from source files and prevents collisions across domains (e.g., 'foo' in 'work' vs 'personal').

nodes.label: Frontmatter Validator
nodes.summary: Shared utility detecting and repairing malformed frontmatter before ingest writes wiki fields. Parses via yaml.parse, applies per-field FieldRules, and re-serializes. Returns original content unchanged when no repairs are needed.

nodes.label: Sidebar View (AiWikiView)
nodes.summary: Obsidian ItemView owning the plugin's sidebar panel. Manages action buttons, domain selector, and button availability via updateButtonAvailability(). Renders eval_result events via MarkdownRenderer.

nodes.label: RunEvent (Run Events)
nodes.summary: Discriminated union emitted as an async generator stream by all operations. Covers LLM streaming deltas, tool calls, domain mutations, format previews, structural errors, graph stats, and phase progress.

nodes.label: Init Operation
nodes.summary: Bootstraps a new domain. LLM call produces id, name, wiki_folder, entity_types, language_notes via DomainEntrySchema. Subsequent files run as ingest passes. Creates _wiki_schema.md, _format_schema.md, and DomainEntry.

nodes.label: Ingest Operation
nodes.summary: Two-call entity-driven flow. LLM #1 extracts entities; per-entity vector top-K selects existing pages; LLM #2 emits writes, optional deletes for merges, and entity_types_delta.

nodes.label: Query Operation
nodes.summary: Two-phase retrieval: seed selection from _index.md annotations via similarity, then BFS expansion over the wiki graph. bfsExpandRanked ranks non-seed pages by similarity and caps at bfsTopK.

nodes.label: Lint Operation
nodes.summary: Analyzes wiki pages one article at a time. Per-article: selects context via PageSimilarityService + BFS, calls LLM, applies fixes, syncs backlinks. Supports useLlm and entityTypeFilter options.

nodes.label: Lint-Chat Operation
nodes.summary: Interactive fix pass driven by a lint report. User provides an instruction; LLM returns LintChatSchema with updated page contents written back to the vault.

nodes.label: Chat Operation
nodes.summary: Free-form conversation after any operation. Takes context and chatMessages history. On claude-agent backend, sessions resume via sessionId for multi-turn continuity.

nodes.label: Format Operation
nodes.summary: Reformats a non-wiki markdown page without changing facts. LLM returns FormatOutputSchema with report and formatted. Preview written to temp file; user applies or cancels. Vision pre-step analyzes embedded images when enabled.

nodes.label: bfsExpandRanked
nodes.summary: BFS expansion with similarity/Jaccard ranking pass. Non-seed pages are ranked and capped at bfsTopK. Seeds always included. Guards against phantom nodes (dangling links never enter expanded set).

nodes.label: Wiki Stem Mask + Collision Guard
nodes.summary: Four-layer enforcement of wiki_<domain>_<entity_slug> filename convention: Zod schema validation, prompt instruction, runtime guard, and migration script.
nodes.rationale: Multiple enforcement layers prevent any single failure mode (LLM hallucination, schema bypass, legacy files) from introducing unprefixed or colliding stems into the wiki.

nodes.label: LintOptionsModal
nodes.summary: Modal UI for configuring a lint run: pre-selected domain, Use LLM toggle, entity type filters with article counts, and select-all/deselect-all buttons.

nodes.label: Attachment Analyzer (Vision Pre-Step)
nodes.summary: Pre-step for the Format operation when vision is enabled. Analyzes embedded images, PDFs, and Excalidraw files, inserting vision descriptions under each embed before formatting proceeds.

nodes.label: AgentRunner Idle Watchdog (0.1.153)
nodes.summary: Added idle watchdog retry loop in AgentRunner.run(). Retries up to llmIdleRetries times when LLM goes silent for llmIdleTimeoutSec seconds.

nodes.label: bfsExpandRanked Feature (0.1.149)
nodes.summary: Added bfsExpandRanked with embedding/Jaccard ranking and bfsTopK limit, replacing bfsExpandWithHops for similarity-ranked BFS context in query.

nodes.label: LintOptionsModal Feature (0.1.154/0.1.153)
nodes.summary: Refactored lint entry to use LintOptionsModal with single domain, entity filter, LLM toggle, select-all, and article counts. Removed Lint UI section from settings panel.

nodes.label: Format Obsidian Embed Fix (0.1.155)
nodes.summary: Fix to restore Obsidian embeds (![[...]]) converted by LLM to standard Markdown during the Format operation.
